name: default
label: Default
description: The original 9 mixed scenes — castle, market, street, alley, forest, firelit interior, desert, cliff, rooftop. Designed to span warm/cool, day/night, and indoor/outdoor without committing to a single domain.

scenes.label: Spooky castle (night)
scenes.default_prompt: Put this exact character in a dark spooky castle at night and change the pose. The character's face is illuminated by dim candlelight, the character is scared. Strong moonlight from a high window creates a strong backlight, dramatic look.

scenes.label: Sunlit market
scenes.default_prompt: Put this exact character in a busy sunlit open-air market and change the pose. Bright midday sun, warm color palette, soft fabric and produce around the character, the character is curious, looking off to one side.

scenes.label: Rainy street
scenes.default_prompt: Put this exact character on a rainy city street at dusk and change the pose. Wet asphalt reflections, scattered streetlamps and shop signs, the character is walking with shoulders slightly raised against the rain, cool color palette.

scenes.label: Neon alley
scenes.default_prompt: Put this exact character in a narrow neon-lit alley at night and change the pose. Magenta and cyan neon signs reflect off damp pavement, low fill light on the face, the character is alert, looking down the alley.

scenes.label: Forest path
scenes.default_prompt: Put this exact character on a quiet forest path at midmorning and change the pose. Dappled sunlight through tall trees, green and gold tones, the character is relaxed and walking, mid-stride.

scenes.label: Firelit interior
scenes.default_prompt: Put this exact character inside a small firelit stone-walled interior at night and change the pose. The fire is the only light source, warm orange key light from below-frame-right, soft shadow on the opposite cheek, the character is thoughtful.

scenes.label: Harsh-noon desert
scenes.default_prompt: Put this exact character in an open desert under harsh noon sun and change the pose. Hard top light, short sharp shadows, sand and pale sky, the character is squinting slightly, hand near the brow.

scenes.label: Overcast cliff
scenes.default_prompt: Put this exact character at the edge of a windswept cliff under heavy overcast and change the pose. Flat soft sky light, muted color palette, the character's hair and clothing pushed by wind, the character is looking out to sea.

scenes.label: Golden-hour rooftop
scenes.default_prompt: Put this exact character on a city rooftop at golden hour and change the pose. Low warm sun behind and to the side of the character, long backlight rim on the silhouette, the character is calm, looking outward over the city.
